subject: English
overall_learning_objectives: Understand the concept of natural wonders
Learn about the Valley of Flowers in Uttarakhand
Understand the significance of Living Root Bridges in Meghalaya
Recognize the importance of biodiversity and ecosystems
Develop appreciation for nature and environmental conservation
Improve reading comprehension and vocabulary skills

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to Natural Wonders
topics_covered: Examples of natural and man-made wonders
teaching_strategy: Observation of pictures from the textbook
Sorting activity: natural vs man-made wonders
student_activities: Identify natural and man-made wonders from pictures
Discuss which wonders they find most interesting

lesson_plan.title: The Valley of Flowers
topics_covered: Location of the Valley of Flowers
teaching_strategy: Guided reading of the Valley of Flowers section
student_activities: List different flowers mentioned in the text
Identify wildlife species found in the valley

lesson_plan.title: Beauty and Biodiversity of the Valley
topics_covered: Ecosystem of the Valley of Flowers
student_activities: Write two sentences about protecting nature

lesson_plan.title: Living Root Bridges of Meghalaya
teaching_strategy: Reading of the Living Root Bridges section
student_activities: Explain how the bridges are created
Discuss why they are environmentally friendly

lesson_plan.title: Human Interaction with Nature
student_activities: Suggest ways to protect natural wonders
Write a short paragraph about caring for nature

lesson_plan.title: Language and Revision Activities
student_activities: Answer short quiz questions about the chapter

teaching_aids: Pictures of Valley of Flowers and Living Root Bridges
teacher_tip: Show images or videos of the Valley of Flowers and Living Root Bridges to help students visualize these natural wonders and understand their beauty and importance.
